description_long: This is a dark, ornate sword with a straight, double-edged blade and a highly decorative crossguard. The crossguard features elaborate, wing-like extensions and a central, circular gem or medallion, giving it a gothic or fantasy appearance. The handle is cylindrical with a textured grip and ends in a rounded pommel, suggesting both functionality and style. The blade is slender and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The overall color scheme is predominantly black with metallic and possibly gold or bronze accents around the guard and central ornament. The craftsmanship and detailing indicate it is designed to be both a weapon and a display piece.
description: A dark, ornate sword with a straight, double-edged blade, elaborate crossguard, and a textured cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full ornate crossguard, central gem, and detailed handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal visible ornamentation.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the crossguard and handle details from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured grip, rounded pommel, dark material
attribute_ornamentation: elaborate crossguard with wing-like extensions and central gem or medallion
